Active Discard Auth
Division Name Division Name is required Only letters and spaces are allowed (2–50 characters)
Division Short Name Division Short Name is required Only uppercase letters allowed (2–10 characters)
Mail ID @if ( divisionForm.get('DivisionMailId')?.invalid && divisionForm.get('DivisionMailId')?.touched ) { Mail ID is required } Remark Remark is required Remark cannot exceed 200 characters Remark cannot start or end with a space
Division Code Division Code is required Only letters and numbers allowed (2–20 characters) Auth Remark Auth Remark is required Auth Remark cannot exceed 200 characters Auth Remark cannot start or end with a space
